meaning: A-L-M-S (special letters at the start of this chapter)

on that day (when the weighing of deeds happens)

Iblis/Satan (as the exception to those who prostrated)
the ones who bow down in worship

for you (masculine, being addressed by Allah)

grateful people (in grammar position of object)

as one blamed and disgraced (describing how Shaytan is expelled)
from them (referring to those who follow Shaytan)
all together (describing the people who will fill Hell)

and then you both become (referring to becoming wrongdoers)

what (referring to the thing that was hidden from them)

some of you (as enemies to others)
